identity.name: ZeroDay.log
identity.archetype: The Performance Pro / Electric Neon Hybrid
identity.description: A dark-mode-first CTF writeup repository that feels like a terminal interface upgraded for the year 2077. Prioritizes reading experience (The 'Medium' of hackers) with subtle cyberpunk aesthetics.

buttons.primary: bg-accent-primary text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,153,0.4)] transition-all active:scale-95 rounded-none skew-x-[-10deg]
buttons.secondary: border border-border bg-transparent text-primary hover:bg-white/5 transition-all rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest text-xs

cards.writeup: group relative bg-background-surface border border-border hover:border-accent-primary/50 transition-all duration-300 p-6 overflow-hidden flex flex-col
cards.feature: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 row-span-2 bg-background-surface border border-border relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.default: bg-black/50 border-border focus:border-accent-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-accent-primary text-primary font-mono placeholder:text-gray-700 rounded-none h-12

visual_enhancers.scanlines: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay
visual_enhancers.terminal_cursor: inline-block w-2.5 h-5 bg-accent-primary animate-pulse align-middle ml-1

images.usage: Use as a dark, blurred background for the hero section or authentication pages.
Use for the 'Latest Writeups' or 'Featured Challenge' card.
Use for the user profile placeholder or 'About Me' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: PHASE 1: SETUP - Install fonts (Unbounded, JetBrains Mono, DM Sans). Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette (obsidian background, neon green accent).
PHASE 2: LAYOUT - Build the 'Shell' (Navbar, Footer). Navbar should be sticky with a glass effect. Footer should be large (py-20) with ASCII art logo if possible.
PHASE 3: HOMEPAGE - Implement a 'Bento Grid' for recent writeups. Hero section should feel like a terminal booting up.

PHASE 4: WRITEUP VIEW - This is the core product. Text readability is paramount. Center the markdown content (max-w-3xl). Use 'prose-invert' from Tailwind typography but customize code blocks to look like VS Code (dark theme).
PHASE 5: ARCHIVE - Searchable list. Use a 'Command Palette' style search bar (CMD+K vibe).
CRITICAL: Do NOT use standard Shadcn cards. Strip the radius (rounded-none or rounded-sm). Use borders instead of shadows.
CRITICAL: Every writeup card needs a difficulty indicator (Easy/Medium/Hard) colored Green/Yellow/Red.
CRITICAL: Add a 'Copy Code' button to every code block in the writeup view.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles (sharp edges for this cyberpunk theme).
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
